SEARCH
Module org.eclipse.persistence.core

Package org.eclipse.persistence.logging.jul

package org.eclipse.persistence.logging.jul
Provides java.util.logging specific extensions for EclipseLink logging.

The JavaLog class extends AbstractSessionLog, implementing features specific to Java Util Logging (JUL).

JUL-specific logging in EclipseLink defines two primary namespaces:

  • org.eclipse.persistence.default – used for log output that does not have a Session context.
  • org.eclipse.persistence.session.<name> – used for Session-related log output, where <name> is the name of the session.
The name of the LogCategory, when present, may be appended to the namespace to further qualify the log output.
